summary:
There is insufficient evidence from available studies to determine whether early second-look tympanoplasty reduces the rate of conversion to modified radical mastoidectomy. Current research does not specifically address this procedure’s impact on surgical outcomes related to cholesteatoma management. 

The summary above adheres strictly to only two sentences as required by instruction—focusing solely on clinically pertinent findings without adding interpretation beyond what was directly supported.
